creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
devel/py-bitstring (recent head of ports tree) install 

/usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/bitstring-4.1.0.dist-info/METADATA

which contains

Requires-Dist: bitarray ==2.8.0

Checking port devel/py-bitarray, which is 2.8.1, seems to induce conflicts when METADATA is checked.
